dry_run_payload.texture_prompt: Strict low-poly game-ready Sherman VVSS tread and running gear envelope, target around 2200 generated polygons, closed track belts and readable wheels/sprockets/idlers/bogie masses with tread shoe and wheel detail in PBR texture/normal maps, not dense geometry. Generate lowpoly directly; no high-poly mesh; no decimation artifacts; no black rubber blob, plaid texture, hull, turret, or text.
